title: WS10 7NR, BIFFA WASTE SERVICES LIMITED: environmental permit issued - EPR/XP3631SE/V006
body: "he Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: BIFFA WASTE SERVICES LIMITED   Installation name: Wednesbury Waste Management Resource Centre   Permit number: EPR/XP3631SE/V006   "
